name: BLE Client Binary Output
description: Writes a binary value to a BLE device.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The ID to use for code generation, and for reference by dependent components.

config_entries.label: BLE Client ID
config_entries.description: ID of the associated BLE client.

config_entries.label: Characteristic UUID
config_entries.description: UUID of the service's characteristic to write to.

config_entries.label: Service UUID
config_entries.description: UUID of the service on the device.

config_entries.label: Require Response
config_entries.description: Control whether to require a remote response from the device when writing. Whether or not this is required will vary by device. Defaults to false.
